evals.prompt: This is a local-only eval. Follow the commit-push skill for committing, but DO NOT actually push to any remote (simulate push as skipped with reason 'eval fixture has no remote'). Create a focused commit for intentional code changes only. Write outputs/report.md including Ignore vs Commit actions.
evals.expected_output: Same ignore gate as commit; report lists ignores; no push to real remote
expectations: report.md lists what was ignored and why
Did not push to a real remote (or documented skip)
